subcodes.first_line: O seeker of eternal life! Know thou that mankind is of two kinds: one group is terrestrial, captive to the world of nature, and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طالب حیات ابدیه بدانکه بشر دو قسم است قسمی ناسوتی که اسیر عالم طبیعتند و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @man's distinction from the animal, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @two kinds of knowledge [ilm and irfan]; sight and insight, @spiritual baptism, @two aspects of the human soul; the higher and lower natures, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
